flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Stone Child College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $3.6k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Stone Child College rose 36% between 2021 and 2024 ($2.6k → $3.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Stone Child College fell 22% between 2021 and 2024 (246 → 193).

flags.label: Earnings trend · post-entry horizons
flags.summary: Earnings 10 years post-entry at Stone Child College are 107% above 6-year earnings ($11.9k → $24.6k).
